body_transformation: The slender elongated body now bears cracked obsidian scales with molten gold veins tracing along the spine and limbs, while the light gray and purple coloration shifts to deep crimson and burnt orange with charcoal black undertones. The rounded head retains its shape but features magma-cracked skin texture across the forehead and temples, with the pointed ears now edged in molten gold. The long flowing tail ends in a flickering flame-tipped point, its surface covered in ember-scaled armor plating that glows faintly. The original glowing aura is replaced by a heat-haze distortion around the body, with smoke trails subtly emanating from the joints.
signature_feature: Flame-tipped tail: ember-scaled armor plating with molten gold veins and flickering crimson flames.
